data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data at all stages of transmission and storage.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Requires MFA to enhance user authentication security.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Continuous monitoring and real-time analytics to detect potential threats.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security audits to identify and address vulnerabilities.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Established protocol to deal with detected security breaches.
